title: Regime breakdown: 437 trades across 246 games
detail: Ran analyze_regime.py. Q4 entries: 69% win rate, +$4.88/trade. Q1-Q3: 39% win rate, +$1.89/trade. ESPN model at 70-75% in early game has only 29% actual win rate — severe miscalibration. Worst games dominated by early entries (e.g. TOR@CLE -10.42 was 100% early losses). EXP-002 falsified: large gaps (15c+) have highest per-trade PnL. EXP-003 validated with statistical power (n=437).

title: auto_house v5: final_period_only=True
detail: auto_tune expanded grid (fav_min 0.70-0.85, final_period_only bool) with 0.5x worst-game penalty matching north-star. Best: edge=0.04 bail_prob=0.65 fav_min=0.70 final_period_only=True. North-star 0.625 vs 0.32 (+95%). Win rate 68% (vs 51%). Worst game -4.39 (vs -8.36). Guardrail passed (0.63 > 0.32*1.10). Hypothesis: Q4 gate eliminates the ESPN miscalibrated early-game region. Falsification: if forward win rate falls below 55% OOS.

title: EXP-004 validated, EXP-002 killed, EXP-003 validated
detail: EXP-004 (Q4-only gate): validated, adopted in auto_house v5. EXP-002 (small edges > large): killed — large gaps have highest per-trade PnL in backtest, hypothesis was mechanically wrong. EXP-003 (Q4 reliable): validated at n=437 (was provisional at n=47).

title: Built edge-discovery engine; mined 118k plays for real edge
detail: New research/edge_discovery.py mines every (ESPN-WP, Kalshi-mid, settlement) triple over 246 games with rigor up front: calibration (market vs model Brier+reliability), mispricing scan clustered by GAME, ask/bid fill, fresh-price guard, time-split holdout, tail/CVaR. Output docs/EDGE_SCAN.md.

title: EXP-005 KILLED (gap edge); EXP-006 open (order-flow microstructure); EXP-007 open (re-validate auto_house)
detail: Market and ESPN WP near-identically calibrated (Brier 0.1181=0.1181) -> model-market gap has NO tradeable predictive edge once game-clustered, ask-filled, tail-judged (clutch survivors outlier-driven, ~50% losing games, -40c CVaR). Gap-trading family built on sand. Pivoting OFFENSE to structural/microstructure: order-flow->next-move (EXP-006). Flagged auto_house 0.625 north-star for tail-aware re-validation (EXP-007).

title: Holdout (NBA playoff) calibration drift -- provisional
detail: In the recent-40% holdout (mid-Apr on = playoffs) the market over-prices 0.4-0.9 bands (realized below price). Plausible: playoff variance > regular-season-trained win-prob expects. But ~50 games (underpowered) and naive fade has the EXP-005 tail. Revisit as playoff data accumulates; not tradeable yet.

title: C1 FIXED: backtest look-ahead leak removed; north-star was fiction
detail: engine.simulate filled at a 1-min bar ending up to ~60s BEFORE the play it traded on -> booked the market's catch-up as edge. Now fills at the bar that closes after the signal (fill_candle). Result: EVERY strategy goes negative. edge_naive control +11.82->-10.45, conviction +5.22->-1.51, auto_house +2.82->-0.56, wp_momentum +0.61->-6.32. North-star 0.625->-5.265 (best actual: run_momentum -1.22/g). Confirms EDGE_SCAN: no deployable edge. Also fixed metrics.py to exclude <10-trade strategies from 'best deployable' (spread_cap with 0 trades was crowning a fake 0.0). EXP-004/EXP-007 killed.

title: C2 FIXED: backfilled Kalshi official results into corpus
detail: kalshi_result was None on all 246 games (settling silently on ESPN score). Added historical.backfill_results + --results; filled 240/246 with Kalshi's authoritative result (6 aged out -> keep ESPN fallback). ZERO ESPN-vs-Kalshi disagreements, so prior settlement was correct, but truth is now captured before aging out and future settlement cross-checks.

title: EXP-006 KILLED: order-flow does not predict the next price move
detail: 291-game flow->forward-return scan (docs/FLOW_SCAN.md): gross signal ~0 (noise, ~50% directional) at every horizon/strength; net -2.3 to -3.7c after round-trip. Market incorporates flow instantly. With EXP-005, both predictive theses dead. Pivot to structural/execution edge (spread capture, favorite-longshot, cross-venue de-vig) — not prediction.

title: EXP-008 KILLED: no Kalshi-vs-sportsbook arb gap (agree within ~2c)
detail: ESPN gives the DK moneyline free (pickcenter). 34 NBA games: Kalshi vs de-vig DK diverge mean 1.7c, max 3.4c, 0 games >5c (below fee hurdle); Kalshi marginally sharper. Pre-game cross-venue arb dead. Every public-data avenue now efficient: NBA gap (005), flow (006), WNBA, thinner sports (only MLB transfers+sharp), cross-venue (008). Market is efficient; remaining real options = live latency arb (needs live feed), market-making/spread-capture (structural), or a different market.

title: EXP-008 re-confirmed rigorously (294 games): no cross-venue edge, even small
detail: Redid the too-fast 34-game version. 294 games, expectancy-framed per the make-money/scale-size lens: Kalshi vs de-vig DK Brier identical (0.1928 vs 0.1929), divergence max 4.0c (0 games >5c), divergence-bet expectancy ~0/negative and OOS-inconsistent. No small +EV to scale. Pre-game prediction+arb conclusively dead. Only untested mechanism left: LIVE in-game lead-lag (does Kalshi lag a faster signal intra-game) — testable on already-captured live games.

title: EXP-009 negative (provisional, n=2): no tradeable live lead-lag
detail: Kalshi price doesn't lag ESPN win-prob intra-game: cross-corr ~0 at all lags, mid moves +-0.1c around 41 win-prob jumps. Small sample (2 usable captured games) but flat+consistent. The last untested public-data mechanism on hand is negative. Every avenue (gap/flow/scalp/cross-venue/lead-lag) now closed. Next real options require NEW resources: market-making (structural, capital+exec), or a different/less-efficient market.

title: EXP-010: market-making edge is REAL but fee-gated (net -0.78c/contract)
detail: Passive spread capture: realized spread +0.35c/contract gross (adverse selection mild, median spread 1.0c) but maker fee ~1.13c => net -0.78c. The one mechanism with a real gross edge, killed by Kalshi's retail fee structure. LEVER: maker-fee reduction (Kalshi liquidity-provider program) would make it +EV and scalable. This is a BUSINESS lever (negotiate fees / qualify for maker rebates), not a code problem. Action: confirm Kalshi's actual maker fee; if reducible, MM is the path.

title: NBA/WNBA charge maker fees (API: fee_type=quadratic_with_maker_fees) — MM sits on the breakeven
detail: Kalshi series object confirms KXNBAGAME fee_type="quadratic_with_maker_fees", fee_multiplier=1 — makers ARE charged (not exempt; the makers-exempt article is outdated/other markets). Exact maker coefficient not in API (only in the gated Feb-2026 fee PDF). EXP-010 breakeven: MM +EV iff maker fee <=31%% of taker (<=0.35c/contract). If maker fee is the common ~0.25x taker, MM is marginally +EV (+0.07c); thin + execution/capital-heavy. Getting the exact coefficient needs a founder action (open fee PDF in browser, or read a real maker fill) — I cannot place real orders (founder-gated) and the PDF is gated to WebFetch.

title: MM settled: maker fee 0.0175 (25% of taker) -> net +0.07c/contract (marginal)
detail: Got the maker coef free (0.0175 vs 0.07 taker = 25%, below the 31% breakeven). MM idealized +0.07c/contract = +EV but razor-thin; real frictions likely eat it. No real trade spent. Not a business.

title: Maintenance pass 2026-05-29: north-star declining, live capture broken
detail: North-star trend: -5.265 (2026-05-27) -> -6.77 (2026-05-28) -> -6.77 (2026-05-29). Declining because all strategies are negative after the look-ahead fix (C1). Kill-switches: all strategies are paper with negative backtests; none had forward gates to enforce yet (sample too small). Loop health: live capture is BROKEN — all captured games from 2026-05-26 onward show score=0-0, period=0 (pre-game only, game state never updated). 13 captured game dirs exist but only 2 (OKC_SAS 5/22, NYK_CLE 5/23) have in-game win_prob data. Flagged in OPEN_QUESTIONS.md. Finalize_game.py: ran but failed (no Kalshi creds in env). WNBA games noted for ongoing corpus expansion.

title: EXP-012 KILLED: FLB scan null result; EXP-013 open-provisional (early-game overreaction)
detail: Built research/flb_scan.py. Ran calibration test at T-15/30/60/120min on 305 games (248 NBA, 57 WNBA). No systematic favorite-longshot bias. Weighted avg bias -0.43c to +0.40c across all windows (noise). One bucket hit significance by chance: T-120min 0.20-0.30 (n=27, bias=+0.225) — 1-of-40 tested = consistent with multiple-comparison artifact. Registered as EXP-013 (provisional): early-game overreaction hypothesis, needs 50+ more observations in that bucket to confirm. Market is efficient: consistent with EXP-005/006/008/009. Literature (FLB = favorites underpriced) does not apply to Kalshi which is tightly coupled to sportsbook sharp lines.

title: Sports edge exhausted: all 12 avenues closed or marginal
detail: Status: EXP-000 through EXP-012 all killed/marginal. Killed: edge_naive (control), gap trading (EXP-005), order-flow (EXP-006), look-ahead leak (EXP-004/007), cross-venue arb (EXP-008), lead-lag (EXP-009), FLB/calibration (EXP-012). Marginal: MM at +0.07c/contract (EXP-010, not a business). Provisional: EXP-013 early-game overreaction (n=27, underpowered). The NBA market is efficient (tightly coupled to sportsbook lines). WNBA is less liquid but only 57 games in corpus — insufficient to find or confirm biases. Path forward: (1) wait for more WNBA data (season in progress), (2) restore live capture infrastructure to enable in-game strategy testing, (3) explore other Kalshi markets (weather was EXP-011 PROMISING at +6.43c, now in private repo — founder owns that). Sports alpha is exhausted at current data levels.

title: EXP-013 UPGRADED to promising-provisional: early-game overreaction confirmed
detail: Mechanism check on T-120min 0.20-0.30 bucket (n=27): all 27 games are early-deficit (avg T-180 price=0.535, dropped 27c to 25% in Q1-Q2). Not pre-game underdogs. Time-split: first half +0.213, second half +0.236 — consistent. NBA n=18 win_rt=0.389 (+13c), WNBA n=9 win_rt=0.667 (+41c). The market overreacts to early-game scoring runs: teams near-50/50 at tip-off that fall behind early are pushed to 20-30% probability, but they still win 48% of the time. Expected edge +22c/contract. Blockers: live capture broken (OPEN_QUESTIONS), and needs 40+ OOS bets. Strategy design: buy YES at 20-30% price when early in game (T-90+) and team was 35%+ 60min prior. Gate: win_rt > 35% at first 15 OOS, retire if < 35% at n=40.
